title: Multi-Agent Health Intelligence System
tagline: Multi-agent WhatsApp health triage system for low-resource clinical environments
problem: Patients in low-resource environments lack access to consistent medical triage, leading to delayed diagnoses and preventable deterioration.
solution: Multi-agent AI architecture using LangGraph for symptom triage, prescription lookup, and patient follow-up. WhatsApp as the delivery layer for accessibility in low-resource settings.
impact: Test cases validated. Built as a learning project exploring multi-agent AI patterns and health-tech accessibility.
